name: STOA AI Factory — Competitive Watch Weekly Digest

meta.description: Template documentation for the n8n competitive watch workflow. Import into n8n manually.
meta.author: STOA AI Factory

steps.description: Fetch Anthropic engineering blog for new posts
Check latest Claude Code npm version
Fetch top posts from r/ClaudeAI this week
Search Hacker News for Claude Code mentions
Aggregate and deduplicate results from all sources
steps.pseudocode: Merge all HTTP responses, deduplicate by URL/title, sort by relevance/recency

steps.description: Generate the weekly digest using Claude
steps.prompt: Tu es un analyste tech. A partir de ces sources, redige un digest de veille concurrentielle pour une equipe qui developpe une IA Factory basee sur Claude Code. Focus sur : nouveautes Claude Code, patterns emergents, moves concurrents, actions recommandees. Format: [voir SKILL.md digest format]

steps.description: If BREAKING items found, create Linear ticket
steps.condition: digest contains BREAKING items with action required

action.description: Create Linear issue with action items from digest

setup_notes: 1. Import this workflow concept into n8n at n8n.gostoa.dev
2. Configure HTTP Request nodes with actual URLs
3. Set up Slack webhook for #stoa-ai-watch channel
4. Optional: configure Linear API key for auto-ticket creation
5. Test with manual trigger before enabling schedule
